changePassword.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 6 characters long
changePassword.title: Change Password

deleteAccount.contactSupport: If you're having issues with the application, please consider contacting support instead of deleting your account.
deleteAccount.dataCannotBeRecovered: Once deleted, this data cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.mustMatchExactly: Please type the exact confirmation text to proceed.
deleteAccount.patientProfile: Your patient profile and personal information
deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.typeConfirmation: To confirm that you want to permanently delete your account and all associated data, please type the following text exactly:
deleteAccount.warningTitle: WARNING: This action cannot be undone!

github.createNewNotSupported: Creating a new account for GitHub users without public email is not yet supported. Please link to an existing account.
github.noPublicEmail: Your GitHub account doesn't have a public email address that we can use to automatically match with an existing account. Please enter your login credentials to link this GitHub account to your existing account.
github.title: Link GitHub Account
github.validationError: Please enter both username and password

login.registrationDisabled: New user registration is currently disabled.
login.title: LOGIN TO YOUR ACCOUNT

sso.accountExistsDescription: We found an existing account with the email address {{email}}. Please choose how you want to handle this. This choice is permanent.
sso.askMeEachTimeDescription: Keep accounts separate for now, but show me this choice again if I try to use SSO with this email in the future.

callback.errorResolving: An error occurred while resolving the account conflict
callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we authenticate your account
callback.registrationDisabled: Account creation is disabled. Your SSO authentication was successful, but no account exists for your email. Please contact an administrator to create an account for you.
callback.slowResponse: This is taking longer than usual. SSO provider may be slow to respond...
callback.stillWaiting: Still waiting for SSO provider response. If this continues, please try again.
callback.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during authentication

sso.createSeparateDescription: Create a brand new account and patient record for your SSO login. Your existing account will remain completely separate.
sso.futureLoginAskAgain: Future logins: If you try to sign in with {{provider}} using this email again, you'll see this choice dialog again.
sso.futureLoginLink: Future logins: With linked accounts, you'll be able to log in using either your password or {{provider}} without seeing this prompt again.
sso.linkAccountsDescription: Permanently connect your {{provider}} account to your existing account. You'll be able to log in using either your password or {{provider}}. This action cannot be undone.
sso.resultCreateSeparate: Result: A new account and patient record will be created for your {{provider}} login. You'll have two completely separate accounts with the same email address.

userCreation.accountCreated: Account created successfully! Please log in with your credentials.
userCreation.cardSubtitle: Fill out the form below to create your new account

nextSteps.autoRecord: Your patient record will be automatically created
nextSteps.dataSecure: All your data is secure and private
nextSteps.loggedIn: You'll be logged in immediately after account creation
nextSteps.startManaging: You can start managing your medical information right away

userCreation.pageSubtitle: Join MediKeep today and manage your health records securely
userCreation.welcomeMessage: Welcome {{name}}! Your account has been created successfully.
